name: TSS, Inc.
summary: TSS, Inc. provides comprehensive services for AI technology integration, planning, design, deployment, maintenance, and refresh of end-user and enterprise systems, including mission-critical data center facilities. Services include technology consulting, systems integration of AI-enabled server racks, facilities management, IT procurement, and second-touch configuration. The company operates ISO-certified integration facilities and has integrated over 500 modular data centers (MDCs), serving enterprise customers deploying solutions in data centers, colocation facilities, and at the network edge.

products.name: Systems Integration Services
products.description: Custom configuration and rack-level integration of IT products including AI-enabled server racks, clusters, and modular containers.

products.name: Facilities Management Services
products.description: Installation, integration, testing, maintenance, and support of modular data centers (MDCs) and mission-critical facilities.

products.name: IT Procurement Services
products.description: Sourcing and procurement of third-party hardware, software, and services, acting as principal or agent depending on involvement.

products.name: Second-Touch Configuration Services
products.description: Adding software, hardware, features, tagging, asset capture, and fulfillment services to end-user devices for OEM and end-user customers.

products.name: Technology Consulting and Engineering
products.description: Design, engineering, and project management for data centers, operations centers, and related infrastructure systems.

partnerships.description: Long-term Master Relationship Agreement for systems integration services for AI-enabled computer racks at minimum monthly volumes.
